calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: vincent d. slavens, esq., krause kalfayan benink & slavens, 619.232.0331, for petitioner david mabbutt.
vince chhabria, deputy city attorney, office of the city attorney, 415.554.4700, for respondent city and county of san francisco.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Granted. The municipal affairs doctrine applies to the challenged fees. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PETITIONER'S VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.
Appearances: Vincent D. Slavens of Krause Kalfayan Benink & Slavens LLP (619.232.0331) appearing via Court Call for petitioner and opposing party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Overruled. Petitioner has adequately alleged standing. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
